author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text:
Auto HTTPS != HTTPS by default

Caddy is the only HTTPS-by-default, general-purpose* server I know of. Any others?

*using term loosely
